title: RecommendationGenerationOutput
description: Structured output required from the recommendation-generation LLM stage. One object per recommendation. The model must ground every rewrite in a quoted span of the candidate's own extracted text (evidence_span) — it must never invent achievements.

source_section.description: Section of the profile this applies to, e.g. 'experience.0'.

evidence_span.description: Verbatim quote from the candidate's extracted text that this rewrite is grounded in. Empty string only if no existing text applies (net-new suggestion).

research_citation_ids.description: IDs of research_documents rows retrieved for this recommendation, if any.
